verification.detail: Interactive shell docs describe the right-side panel, tab set, and Queue as the live planning/status surface.
Built-in Ratatui shell is the active operator surface and must consume the same queue truth as control status.
Queue and control status are one shared model, and the TUI is a consumer of control-plane truth.
Run, Agents, and Control tabs resolve through selected_active_run(snapshot, selected_wave_id), preferring the selected wave's active run.

deploy_risks: repo-local only; no live host mutation.
notes: Right-side operator panel, queue truth, fallback summary, and component promotions are documented as one surface.
The TUI now projects authoritative control-plane truth for selected waves rather than drifting to the first active run.
No blocking integration gaps remain in the owned wave-5 closure slice.
marker: [wave-integration] state=ready-for-doc-closure claims=0 conflicts=0 blockers=0 detail=right-side panel now binds to selected-wave run state and shared queue truth
